questionHtml:
Which of the following shows a general increase across period 3 from Na to Cl?

A.  Ionic radius

B.  Atomic radius

C.  Ionization energy

D.  Melting point

meta.title: Which of the following shows a general increase across period 3 from Na to Cl? A. Ionic radius B. Atomic radius C. Ionization energy D. Melting point
breadcrumbLabels: Structure 3.1—The periodic table: Classification of elements
Structure 3.1.3—Periodicity refers to trends in properties of elements across a period and down a group.
